summary: ACCEPT. Final read-only branch review for chore/m0-exit-enter-m1 found the M0 exit/M1 entry diff suitable for PR and auto-merge if required checks pass. The gate record is evidence-bounded, M0-GATE handoffs validate, reviewer thread IDs match the registry/routes, goal-mode state is M1-ready, MILESTONE-AUTONOMY-AMENDMENT-001 preserves M5/R4/frozen-decision gates, and no code/dependency/schema/game implementation changes were introduced.

tests_run.result: On chore/m0-exit-enter-m1 with only M0 gate/status/model-routing/thread-registry docs and message/route files changed; two extra M0-GATE route logs were reviewed as audit evidence.

tests_run.command: validate-handoff for M0-GATE QA and systems handoffs
tests_run.result: Both project/messages/outbox M0-GATE ACCEPT handoffs validated successfully.
FOUNDATION-001 through FOUNDATION-008 and PROCESS-001 are CLOSED; ready output empty.

tests_run.command: JSON parse and goal-mode M1/human_gate shape checks
tests_run.result: current_milestone M1, human_gate.required false, current_tasks empty, active_threads empty, approval recorded.
No duplicate thread IDs; model-routing active_threads empty; M0-GATE reviewer records present.
All four M0-GATE route/close files point to expected qa_reviewer or systems_architect registry thread IDs.

tests_run.command: git diff --name-only e99b348 -- package.json pnpm-lock.yaml apps packages tools .github
tests_run.result: No code, dependency, schema/tool, app/package, or CI files changed.
Prettier, ESLint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary checks passed.

decisions: ACCEPT: Branch diff is suitable for PR and auto-merge if required checks pass.
ACCEPT: M0 gate record does not overclaim beyond reviewed evidence and keeps M5 release/vertical-slice passage, gameplay expansion, and frozen-decision changes out of scope.

ACCEPT: MILESTONE-AUTONOMY-AMENDMENT-001 permits ordinary M1-M4 exit automation only under matrix/reviewer/CI validation and does not remove M5, R4, frozen-decision, release/business/telemetry/mod/macOS, or cultural/historical gates.
risks: Two additional untracked M0-GATE route logs were present beyond the user-provided changed-file list. They were reviewed and match registry thread IDs; include them intentionally in the branch or drop them intentionally before PR, but they are not blockers.
This review did not rerun artifact-producing M0 commands; the branch changes are docs/process metadata only and prior gate evidence plus PR #9 CI remain the artifact evidence.
requested_action: Persist this final QA ACCEPT addendum, include the reviewed M0-GATE route logs intentionally if keeping them, then open/merge the chore/m0-exit-enter-m1 PR only after required checks pass.
